title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker16: coap_config.c
close_reason: Fixed merge conflict in coap_config.c by updating resource registration to lichen_coap (per CMakeLists modular preference and mutual exclusivity with standalone server), replaced outdated identity->ygg with identity->primary to match struct, removed dead hex_len check, tightened freq_mhz validation bound. Verified with git diff and build consistency. Commit ce6f54c
